items.raw_desc: Katonai kés ANV Knives M25:The M25 knife is developed in cooperation with members of the 25th Anti-Aircraft Missile Regiment from Strakon. ANV Knives has chosen a 3.5mm thick cryotechnically hardened blade made from Sleipner steel, which is additionally coated with DLC to ensure a smooth cut, high performance and minimal blade weight. The M25 knife handles are precision milled from a block of micarta and everything is assembled using stainless steel screws and solid welded bushings. A series of notches are milled on the spine of the M25 knife to match the exact scale of the map 1:25,000. The notches clearly mark the location first for 250 m to 1 km and then up to 5 km. The emergency pointer allows the user to quickly and accurately target areas on the map, such as effective range. The end of the handle is further fitted with a tool for fixing the RBS projectile. items.raw_desc: Katonai kés ANV Knives M25:The M25 knife is developed in cooperation with members of the 25th Anti-Aircraft Missile Regiment from Strakon. ANV Knives has chosen a 3.5mm thick cryotechnically hardened blade made from Sleipner steel, which is additionally coated with DLC to ensure a smooth cut, high performance and minimal blade weight. The M25 knife handles are precision milled from a block of micarta and everything is assembled using stainless steel screws and solid welded bushings. A series of notches are milled on the spine of the M25 knife to match the exact scale of the map 1:25,000. The notches clearly mark the location first for 250 m to 1 km and then up to 5 km. The emergency pointer allows the user to quickly and accurately target areas on the map, such as effective range. The end of the handle is further fitted with a tool for fixing the RBS projectile.
